name: Apricot Delight Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Jello, sugar, and water in a bowl. Heat until it comes to a boil and then dissolve the Jello completely.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the fruit. Set aside to cool.
3. In another bowl, combine the milk and cream cheese. Beat until smooth.
4. Stir in the cooled Jello mixture. Add the chopped nuts.
5. Pour into a mold or bowl and refrigerate.
WARNING: Ensure proper food safety measures are followed when preparing and storing this dish.
